result.stderr:
Docfx2xml 1.0.0
Opensquiggly.com

  -y, --yml          Required. Path to folder with docfx .yml files

  -x, --xml          (Default: xml_out) Path to result folder for xml
                     files(created automatically if not exist)

  -s, --xsl          Path to xslt file using for transform default xml in
                     OpenSquiggly

  -n, --namespace    (Default: true) Split xml files in inner folders by
                     namespace

  -c, --converter    (Default: d) Xml converter type, should be 'c' - custom,
                     'd' - default, 'cn' - custom without namespace xml files,
                     Default value is 'd'

  -b, --buildtree    (Default: true) Build additional files for OpenSquiggly
                     tree format type view

  --help             Display this help screen.

  --version          Display version information.
